author: Flynn
note: Very early experimental rune-to-number mapping before the final 9-bit hypercube system was locked in. Uses only 8 bits and no parity dyad.
description: Historical draft – shows evolution toward final White Wolf / Dark Wolf system

sample_runes.name: Fehu
sample_runes.comment: Later became 100000001 (9-bit) with White Wolf parity

sample_runes.name: Dagaz
sample_runes.comment: Final version: 011111100 – added Divine Core dimension

historical_significance: Proves the rune-to-binary pipeline concept existed before the final 9D tube geometry and White Wolf / Dark Wolf dyad were formalized. Included for prior-art protection.
